revision.text:
'''乙卯'''（きのとう、いつぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて52番目で、前は[[甲寅]]、次は[[丙辰]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==乙卯の年==
==乙卯の日== ===[[選日]]=== 乙卯の日は[[八専]]の3日目（間日を除く）である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''乙卯'''（きのとう、おつぼくのうさぎ、おつぼくのう、いつぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの52番目で、前は[[甲寅]]、次は[[丙辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==乙卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って55が余る年が乙卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[55年]] *[[115年]] *[[175年]] *[[235年]] *[[295年]] *[[355年]] *[[415年]] *[[475年]] *[[535年]] *[[595年]] *[[655年]] *[[715年]] *[[775年]] *[[835年]] *[[895年]] *[[955年]] | *[[1015年]] *[[1075年]] *[[1135年]] *[[1195年]] *[[1255年]] *[[1315年]] *[[1375年]] *[[1435年]] *[[1495年]] *[[1555年]] *[[1615年]] *[[1675年]] *[[1735年]] *[[1795年]] *[[1855年]] *[[1915年]] *[[1975年]] | *[[2035年]] *[[2095年]] *[[2155年]] *[[2215年]] *[[2275年]] *[[2335年]] *[[2395年]] *[[2455年]] *[[2515年]] *[[2575年]] *[[2635年]] *[[2695年]] *[[2755年]] *[[2815年]] *[[2875年]] *[[2935年]] *[[2995年]] |}
==乙卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[2月]]が乙卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙卯の日== ===選日=== 乙卯の日は[[八専]]の3日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{乙卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:乙卯]]

==乙卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って55が余る年が乙卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[55年]] *[[115年]] *[[175年]] *[[235年]] *[[295年]] *[[355年]] *[[415年]] *[[475年]] *[[535年]] *[[595年]] *[[655年]] *[[715年]] *[[775年]] *[[835年]] *[[895年]] *[[955年]] | *[[1015年]] *[[1075年]] *[[1135年]] *[[1195年]] *[[1255年]] *[[1315年]] *[[1375年]] *[[1435年]] *[[1495年]] *[[1555年]] *[[1615年]] *[[1675年]] *[[1735年]] *[[1795年]] *[[1855年]] *[[1915年]] *[[1975年]] | *[[2035年]] *[[2095年]] *[[2155年]] *[[2215年]] *[[2275年]] *[[2335年]] *[[2395年]] *[[2455年]] *[[2515年]] *[[2575年]] *[[2635年]] *[[2695年]] *[[2755年]] *[[2815年]] *[[2875年]] *[[2935年]] *[[2995年]] |}
==乙卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[2月]]が乙卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙卯の日== ===選日=== 乙卯の日は[[八専]]の3日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rabbit}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:乙卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]]

==乙卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って55が余る年が乙卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[55年]] *[[115年]] *[[175年]] *[[235年]] *[[295年]] *[[355年]] *[[415年]] *[[475年]] *[[535年]] *[[595年]] *[[655年]] *[[715年]] *[[775年]] *[[835年]] *[[895年]] *[[955年]] | *[[1015年]] *[[1075年]] *[[1135年]] *[[1195年]] *[[1255年]] *[[1315年]] *[[1375年]] *[[1435年]] *[[1495年]] *[[1555年]] *[[1615年]] *[[1675年]] *[[1735年]] *[[1795年]] *[[1855年]] *[[1915年]] *[[1975年]] | *[[2035年]] *[[2095年]] *[[2155年]] *[[2215年]] *[[2275年]] *[[2335年]] *[[2395年]] *[[2455年]] *[[2515年]] *[[2575年]] *[[2635年]] *[[2695年]] *[[2755年]] *[[2815年]] *[[2875年]] *[[2935年]] *[[2995年]] |}
==乙卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[2月]]が乙卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙卯の日== ===選日=== 乙卯の日は[[八専]]の3日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rabbit}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:乙卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Wood Rabbit]]

==乙卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って55が余る年が乙卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[55年]] *[[115年]] *[[175年]] *[[235年]] *[[295年]] *[[355年]] *[[415年]] *[[475年]] *[[535年]] *[[595年]] *[[655年]] *[[715年]] *[[775年]] *[[835年]] *[[895年]] *[[955年]] | *[[1015年]] *[[1075年]] *[[1135年]] *[[1195年]] *[[1255年]] *[[1315年]] *[[1375年]] *[[1435年]] *[[1495年]] *[[1555年]] *[[1615年]] *[[1675年]] *[[1735年]] *[[1795年]] *[[1855年]] *[[1915年]] *[[1975年]] | *[[2035年]] *[[2095年]] *[[2155年]] *[[2215年]] *[[2275年]] *[[2335年]] *[[2395年]] *[[2455年]] *[[2515年]] *[[2575年]] *[[2635年]] *[[2695年]] *[[2755年]] *[[2815年]] *[[2875年]] *[[2935年]] *[[2995年]] |}
==乙卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[2月]]が乙卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙卯の日== ===選日=== 乙卯の日は[[八専]]の3日目（間日を除く）である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:乙卯]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Wood Rabbit]] [[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Rabbit also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 乙卯'''（きのとう、おつぼくのうさぎ、おつぼくのう、いつぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの52番目で、前は[[甲寅]]、次は[[丙辰]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==乙卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って55が余る年が乙卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[55年]] *[[115年]] *[[175年]] *[[235年]] *[[295年]] *[[355年]] *[[415年]] *[[475年]] *[[535年]] *[[595年]] *[[655年]] *[[715年]] *[[775年]] *[[835年]] *[[895年]] *[[955年]] | *[[1015年]] *[[1075年]] *[[1135年]] *[[1195年]] *[[1255年]] *[[1315年]] *[[1375年]] *[[1435年]] *[[1495年]] *[[1555年]] *[[1615年]] *[[1675年]] *[[1735年]] *[[1795年]] *[[1855年]] *[[1915年]] *[[1975年]] | *[[2035年]] *[[2095年]] *[[2155年]] *[[2215年]] *[[2275年]] *[[2335年]] *[[2395年]] *[[2455年]] *[[2515年]] *[[2575年]] *[[2635年]] *[[2695年]] *[[2755年]] *[[2815年]] *[[2875年]] *[[2935年]] *[[2995年]] |}
==乙卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[2月]]が乙卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙卯の日== ===選日=== 乙卯の日は[[八専]]の3日目（間日を除く）である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "-qq]]" to "—>[[category:qq close]]"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category:tier 4]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rabbit—>[[category:qq close]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:Y" to "[[sn:"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]][[Category:tier 4]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Rabbit-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙卯]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "qqq" to "qq"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and the Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

tier 5]][[Category: 4]][[Category:tier 4]] [[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Rabbit-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rabbit}}[[Category:11]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft|12=draft}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=draft|12=draft}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|12=draft|12=draft}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月|12=draft|12=draft}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明|12=draft|12=draft}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} <!--Yin Wood Rabbit--> <!--Yin Wood Rabbit-->
[[cdo:Kí-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Wasser-Ziegenevi]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-chhá]][[zh-yue:己未]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category: 4]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:乙卯]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Yin Wood Rabbit]] [[en:Yin Wood Rabbit]] [[ja:乙卯]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ko:을묘]] [[fr:Lièvre de bois]] [[de:Holz-Hase]] [[sn:in Wood Rabbit]] [[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]] [[de:Wasser-Ziegeneen]] [[en:Water Goat]] [[fr:Chèvre de eauboishak]] [[it:Ki-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichinja]] [[ko:계미]] [[vi:Kỷ Mùi]] [[za:Keiceij]] [[zh:己未]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rabbit}} [[ar:Yin Wood Rabbit]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|甲寅|12=draft|12=draft}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|丙辰|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft|12=draft}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|木|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=draft|12=draft}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|12=draft|12=draft}} combination.
== Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[55]] * [[115]] * [[175]] * [[235]] * [[295]] * [[355]] * [[415]] * [[475]] * [[535]] * [[595]] * [[655]] * [[715]] * [[775]] * [[835]] * [[895]] * [[955]] | * [[1015]] * [[1075]] * [[1135]] * [[1195]] * [[1255]] * [[1315]] * [[1375]] * [[1435]] * [[1495]] * [[1555]] * [[1615]] * [[1675]] * [[1735]] * [[1795]] * [[1855]] * [[1915]] * [[1975]] | * [[2035]] * [[2095]] * [[2155]] * [[2215]] * [[2275]] * [[2335]] * [[2395]] * [[2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[2815]] * [[2875]] * [[2935]] * [[2995]] |}
== Months of the Yin Wood Rabbit == In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the {{ill|February|ja|2月|12=draft|12=draft}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|ja|啓蟄|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming|ja|清明|12=draft|12=draft}}) is used.
== Days of the Yin Wood Rabbit == === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=draft|12=draft}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|きのとう}} <!--Yin Wood Rabbit--> <!--Yin Wood Rabbit-->

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904791]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904791]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ '''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-māu]][[de:Holz-Hase]][[hak:Yet-mâu]][[ja:乙卯]][[ko:을묘]][[vi:Ất Mão]][[za:Ietmaux]][[zh-min-nan:It-báu]][[zh_yue:乙卯]][[zh:乙卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904791]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

(木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie (比和)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}
