'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.

corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

{{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-māu]][[de:Holz-Hase]][[hak:Yet-mâu]][[ja:乙卯]][[ko:을묘]][[vi:Ất Mão]][[za:Ietmaux]][[zh-min-nan:It-báu]][[zh-yue:乙卯]][[zh:乙卯]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-māu]][[de:Holz-Hase]][[hak:Yet-mâu]][[ja:乙卯]][[ko:을묘]][[vi:Ất Mão]][[za:Ietmaux]][[zh-min-nan:It-báu]][[zh-yue:乙卯]][[zh:乙卯]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-māu]][[de:Holz-Hase]][[hak:Yet-mâu]][[ja:乙卯]][[ko:을묘]][[vi:Ất Mão]][[za:Ietmaux]][[zh-min-nan:It-báu]][[zh-yue:乙卯]][[zh:乙卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904791]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: itsumi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとうさぎ (kinoto-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつかのうさぎ (otsuka-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: おつぼう (otsubō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of the Yin Wood Rabbit''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:55|55]] * [[:en:115|115]] * [[:en:175|175]] * [[:en:235|235]] * [[:en:295|295]] * [[:en:355|355]] * [[:en:415|415]] * [[:en:475|475]] * [[:en:535|535]] * [[:en:595|595]] * [[:en:655|655]] * [[:en:715|715]] * [[:en:775|775]] * [[:en:835|835]] * [[:en:895|895]] * [[:en:955|955]] | * [[:en:1015|1015]] * [[:en:1075|1075]] * [[:en:1135|1135]] * [[:en:1195|1195]] * [[:en:1255|1255]] * [[:en:1315|1315]] * [[:en:1375|1375]] * [[:en:1435|1435]] * [[:en:1495|1495]] * [[:en:1555|1555]] * [[:en:1615|1615]] * [[:en:1675|1675]] * [[:en:1735|1735]] * [[:en:1795|1795]] * [[:en:1855|1855]] * [[:en:1915|1915]] * [[:en:1975|1975]] | * [[:en:2035|2035]] * [[:en:2095|2095]] * [[:en:2155|2155]] * [[:en:2215|2215]] * [[:en:2275|2275]] * [[:en:2335|2335]] * [[:en:2395|2395]] * [[:en:2455|2455]] * [[2515]] * [[2575]] * [[:en:2635|2635]] * [[2695]] * [[2755]] * [[:en:2815|2815]] * [[:en:2875|2875]] * [[:en:2935|2935]] * [[:en:2995|2995]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit== In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the [[:en:February|February]] of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Jingzhe]] to the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) is used.
==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit== === Selection Days === Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: itsumi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão

==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.

==Months of Yin Wood Rabbit==
In years where the last digit is 3 or 8 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the {{ill|February|en|February|WD=Q109|lt=February}} of that year is considered a Yin Wood Rabbit month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Jingzhe}} to the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Wood Rabbit==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Wood Rabbit days are the third day of the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} cycle, excluding intervening days.

Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rabbit
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} {{ill|Mao|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} also corresponds to Yin Wood, making it a {{ill|Bihe (Five Elements)|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bihe (Five Elements)|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} combination.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Rabbit (乙卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Otsuboku-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: itsumi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulmyo (을묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mão

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rabbit|kanji=乙卯|romaji=kinoto usagi|onyomi=otsubō|p=yǐmǎo|w=i-mao|mi=i²¹ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 maau5|j=jyut6 maau5|ci=jyt̚ maːu̯|mc=ʔit maw|oc-bs=Ɂik maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rabbit''', also known as '''Otsubō''' (乙卯, Kinotō, Otsuboku no Usagi, Otsuboku no U, Itsubō), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 52nd combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Jia Yin|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Yin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Bing Chen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing Chen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Wood (Wu Xing)|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy ==Years of Yin Wood Rabbit==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 55 are considered Yin Wood Rabbit years.
